title: Regolamenti dwar Financial Intermediary Awtorizzat (Income minn Investiment)
title_en: Regolamenti dwar Financial Intermediary Awtorizzat (Income minn Investiment)
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/123.73/mlt, expression eli/sl/123.73/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: L-AVVI| LEGALI 404 ta’ l-2003, kif emendat bl-Avvi\ Legali 235 ta’ l2005
provisions.content:
It-titolu ta’ dawn ir-regolamenti hu Regolamenti dwar
Financial Intermediary Awtorizzat (Income minn Investiment).

provisions.title: Financial Intermediary Awtorizzat (Income minn Investiment)
provisions.content:
F’dawn ir-regolamenti:

Titolu.
Tifsiriet.

''l-Att'' tfisser l-Att dwar it-Taxxa fuq l-Income;
''financial intermediary awtorizzat'' tfisser, g]all-g]anijiet ta’
dawn ir-regolamenti, persuna li tkun re[istrata b]ala financial
intermediary awtorizzat g]all-iskopijiet tar-Regolamenti dwar
Skemi ta’ Investiment Kollettiv (Income minn Investiment);

L.S. 123.51

''income minn investiment'' g]andha t-tifsira mog]tija lilha flartikolu 41 ta’ l-Att;
''disposizzjonijiet dwar income minn investiment'' g]andha ttifsira mog]tija lilha fl-artikolu 32 ta’ l-Att.

provisions.title: Tifsiriet
provisions.content:
Minkejja kull ]a[a o]ra g]all-kuntrarju li tinsab fiddisposizzjonijiet ta’ l-artikolu 33 ta’ l-Att u sakemm ma jkunx
provdut b’mod ie]or fir-Regolamenti dwar Skemi ta’ Investiment
Kollettiv (Income minn Investiment), meta pagament ta’ income
minn investiment isir permezz ta’ financial intermediary awtorizzat
skond id-disposizzjonijiet ta’ l-artikolu 41A(`)(ii) ta’ l-Att,
financial intermediary awtorizzat jista’ ji[bor it-taxxa u j]allas ittaxxa hekk mi[bura mhux aktar tard mit-tletin ta’ {unju li ja]bat
wara s-sena li fiha jkun sar il-pagament ta’ income minn
investiment.

|mien biex
tin[abar u tit]allas
it-taxxa.
Emendat:
A.L. 235 ta’ l2005.
L.S. 123.51
